name: What do I do if a lawyer's AI-drafted motion got my case dismissed?
description: Sue for malpractice with proof; act fast on limitations.

mainEntity.name: What do I do if a lawyer's AI-drafted motion got my case dismissed?

acceptedAnswer.text: Sue for malpractice with proof; act fast on limitations.
acceptedAnswer.description: File a malpractice claim if negligence shown. Context: Courts reject unverified AI filings; recent cases sanction lawyers. Key factors: Lack of review, hallucinations causing dismissal, provable damages. Practical guidance: Preserve all drafts/emails, contact malpractice attorney immediately, check statute of limitations (1-6 years by state).
